videos.title: Credit Report Errors
videos.script: Most people have no idea their credit report contains errors. 605b.ai scans your credit file like TurboTax scans your taxes — upload your report, we flag suspicious items and incorrect information. Then generate professional dispute letters with proper statute references in minutes. Try it free at 605b.ai and take control of your credit.

videos.title: Identity Theft Recovery
videos.script: Identity theft victims often struggle with the wrong paperwork for months. 605b.ai has the actual FCRA workflows you need — upload credit reports, identify theft-related accounts, generate statute-specific letters. Built for people who want to handle their own recovery process. Get started free at 605b.ai.

videos.title: Collections Disputes
videos.script: Questionable collections on your credit report are more common than you think. 605b.ai analyzes your credit files and flags accounts that don't look right — wrong dates, incorrect balances, unverified debts. Then generates FDCPA and FCRA compliant dispute letters. Try free at 605b.ai. Own your credit process.
